Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11261 0 0}I've traveled outside of Japan a few times with my family.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}It was always a lot of fun, and I have a lot of great memories, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11250 0 0}I mean, I won't just be visiting; I'll be living there...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11224 0 0}{f 5 13 11 15 108}O-Oh! You might have a point there! A romantic encounter in a foreign land, huh...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 108 0 25 25}Wait, what am I saying!? It's not like I'll be on vacation! I'll be there to study![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я дізнався про нього трохи більше сьогодні.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11220 0 0}{f 5 13 11 30 108}You have a point there... I'm sure I'll encounter a lot of things that I wouldn't if I stayed here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 108 0 25 25}Learning about different cultures could be an invaluable experience for a young artist like me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що ми стали значно ближчими сьогодні.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11255 0 0}That's right, if I study abroad, I won't have to listen to my dad's nagging all the time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 108 3 25 25}But I won't be able to see you or the other club members, either! I'll get so homesick...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що ми не стали ближчими сьогодні...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11264 0 0}Oh, by the way, that fortune telling book I got the other day was pretty interesting.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's a method called Tasseography that tells your fortune through interpreting patterns left by coffee grounds...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ми ще трохи поговорили,[n]а потім я вирішив повернутися до гуртожитку.[n]{f 1 1}
